title: stachys rivularis
intro: Stachys rivularis, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, headaches, and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stachys rivularis include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to reduce fever and relieve pain. Stachys rivularis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
